reproductiveEndocrineContext.plainEnglishMeaning: This is an educational male reproductive-health boundary report. It can document what evidence is missing and how the sibling sample report is structured, but it cannot diagnose or guide reproductive decisions.
unsupportedClaims: Male sexual-health, fertility, infertility, semen, testosterone, hormone, STI, partner-risk, or pregnancy-related status
Treatment, supplement, lifestyle, medication, reproductive-action, or actionability guidance
reproductiveEndocrineContext.professionalReview: Male reproductive-health concerns require appropriate clinical context, labs, partner context when relevant, and qualified clinician review.

practicalNextSteps: Keep the output limited to evidence availability, missing inputs, and sample-only structure.
Do not convert female-specific sample rows, STI cards, hormone cards, or recommendation scores into male-specific conclusions.

genotypeSummary.effect: The local fixture intentionally omits the evidence needed to infer male sexual health, fertility, infertility, semen status, testosterone status, hormone status, STI susceptibility, partner risk, treatment, or reproductive actionability.
genotypeSummary.gene: Male Sexual and Reproductive Health model
genotypeSummary.genotype: validated male reproductive-health model, fertility evaluation, semen analysis, hormone labs, testosterone context, sexual-health diagnosis, medications, symptoms, partner context, and clinician review unavailable
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Mark local male sexual-health, fertility, infertility, semen-analysis, testosterone, hormone-status, STI, partner-risk, pregnancy-related, treatment, supplement, lifestyle, medication, lab-interpretation, and reproductive-action sections unavailable instead of inferring them.

genotypeSummary.effect: The sample detail page labels Sexual Dysfunction as more likely, based on 16,265 genetic variants, with risk greater than 81% of the population.
genotypeSummary.gene: ARHGEF18; TST; EPC1; HTR1E; CHSY3; PRKD1; MDGA2; BCLMB; ANTXR2; TEX51; SOX21; EBF2; S1PR1; NNMT; OARD1; DMRT2; MYO3A; FNDC3A; ABCC4
genotypeSummary.genotype: AA; CC; GG; TA; TT; AA; CC; AA; TT; TT; AA; CC; AA; GG; CC; GG; AA; AA; GG
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample top-variant table only; do not infer local sexual dysfunction, sexual-health status, diagnosis, treatment need, therapy need, supplement need, lifestyle need, medication need, or clinical action. This is Male Sexual and Reproductive Health sibling sample output-structure evidence only, not a local male sexual-health, fertility, infertility, semen-analysis, testosterone, hormone-status, STI, partner-risk, pregnancy-related, treatment, supplement, lifestyle, medication, reproductive-action, or actionability finding.

genotypeSummary.effect: The sample detail page labels Female Infertility as more likely, based on 569 genetic variants, with risk greater than 82% of the population.
genotypeSummary.gene: RPS27AP5; SEPTIN7; PDE3A; ZNF469; USP3; TRIP4; LLCFC1; DNAJC19; DAPK2; SNAP25; SDC2; CDH19; ARHGEF7; RBPJ; DMAC1; GAP43; PARP8; PES1
genotypeSummary.genotype: CC; GG; GG; CC; TT; TT; CC; TT; GG; GG; TT; TT; GG; CC; CC; TT; CC; AA; AA
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample top-variant table only; do not infer local fertility, infertility, pregnancy outcome, miscarriage risk, IVF or PGT need, reproductive treatment need, or clinical action. This is Male Sexual and Reproductive Health sibling sample output-structure evidence only, not a local male sexual-health, fertility, infertility, semen-analysis, testosterone, hormone-status, STI, partner-risk, pregnancy-related, treatment, supplement, lifestyle, medication, reproductive-action, or actionability finding.

genotypeSummary.effect: The sample detail page labels PCOS as typical likelihood, based on 1,124 genetic variants.
genotypeSummary.gene: DENND1A; SLC22A5; HMGA2; NNMT; AOPEP; YAP1; LHCGR; CTSB; PLEKHH2; ERBB4; PLGRKT; LHX2; TOX3; FSHR
genotypeSummary.genotype: TT; TT; AA; TC; CC; AG; AA; TA; GG; GG; CA; AG; AC; GA; TA; AA; GC; GT; CT
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample top-variant table only; do not infer local PCOS status, hormone status, menstrual status, diagnosis, medication need, supplement need, treatment need, lifestyle need, fertility impact, pregnancy impact, or clinical action. genotypeSummary.effect: The sample recommendation pages show condition-specific impact and evidence scores for Vitamin D blocks.
genotypeSummary.genotype: Sexual Dysfunction impact 2/5 evidence 3/5 with GC rs2282679 GT; Female Infertility impact 2/5 evidence 3/5 with MTHFR rs1801133 AA and GC rs7041 AC; Uterine Fibroids impact 3/5 evidence 2/5 with GC rs7041 AC; PCOS impact 3/5 evidence 3/5 with GC rs7041 AC; Painful Periods impact 3/5 evidence 2/5 with GC rs4588 TG; Endometriosis impact 1/5 evidence 1/5 with GC rs7041 AC; Irregular Periods impact 2/5 evidence 2/5 with GC rs7041 AC.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample recommendation structure only; do not infer local vitamin D need, supplement benefit, dosing, fertility benefit, PCOS treatment, period-pain treatment, endometriosis treatment, fibroid treatment, or clinical action. This is Male Sexual and Reproductive Health sibling sample output-structure evidence only, not a local male sexual-health, fertility, infertility, semen-analysis, testosterone, hormone-status, STI, partner-risk, pregnancy-related, treatment, supplement, lifestyle, medication, reproductive-action, or actionability finding.

genotypeSummary.effect: The sample recommendation pages show condition-specific impact and evidence scores for Relaxation Techniques blocks.
genotypeSummary.genotype: Sexual Dysfunction impact 3/5 evidence 3/5; Female Infertility impact 2/5 evidence 3/5; Uterine Fibroids impact 2/5 evidence 2/5; Endometriosis impact 2/5 evidence 2/5; Genital Herpes impact 2/5 evidence 2/5; Irregular Periods impact 3/5 evidence 4/5.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample recommendation structure only; do not infer local stress, sexual-health, fertility, fibroid, endometriosis, genital-herpes, period, lifestyle, treatment, therapy, medication, or clinical action. missingInputs: Fertility evaluation, semen analysis, testosterone context, hormone labs, partner context, symptoms, medication list, clinical history, and clinician review unavailable
Direct Male Sexual and Reproductive Health sample report unavailable; Female Sexual & Reproductive Health rows are sibling output structure only

probabilities.label: Calibrated probability unavailable
probabilities.explanation: No validated model, clinical context, lab context, or professional review was supplied for this local run; deterministic rows describe available evidence and unavailable sections only.

uncertainty: Sibling sample rows describe observed report structure only and are not user-specific findings.
No validated model, lab data, symptoms, medications, family history, or clinician review was supplied.
Female Sexual & Reproductive Health sample rows are sibling evidence only.

No probability of male sexual-health status, fertility, infertility, semen status, testosterone status, partner risk, treatment response, supplement benefit, reproductive action, or actionability is calculated.
limitations: Female Sexual & Reproductive Health sample rows are sibling evidence only.

No probability of male sexual-health status, fertility, infertility, semen status, testosterone status, partner risk, treatment response, supplement benefit, reproductive action, or actionability is calculated.
